string-array.name: face_error_vendor
string-array.item: Ũbá puderi usai Mupirarisawa ruáwara. E-usai amũ metudu pirí mupirari dispusitiwo.
Ũbá puderi mupirari. Nhũtu ruá suaxawa upitá detekitara.

string-array.name: fingerprint_acquired_vendor
string-array.item: Kuá dedu urikute yumutirika mirixĩga amuramẽ. Remunhã amú wiaji.

string-array.name: sms_roaming_guard_modes
string-array.item: Remũdu irupĩtuté mairamẽ uiku uku upewara upe

string-array.name: wfcOperatorErrorAlertMessages
string-array.item: Remunhãrã senũisá asuí umũdú mẽsaji Wi-Fi irũ, yepesáwa reruré ne uperadura kití ukũfigurari arã kuá serwisu. Ariré, religari amũ viaji senũisá Wi-Fi irũ kũfigurasãu upé. Eawísawa paparisawa: %1$s

string-array.name: wfcOperatorErrorNotificationMessages
string-array.item: Umeresê yepé iwasusawa ĩdé repurupuri senũĩsawa WiFi rupí ne uperasawa ramẽ: %1$s
